---
title: "Aim 1: Linear Regression Risk Burden Sensitivity Analysis"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    self-contained: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warnings = FALSE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = here::here())
```

```{r setting}
library(broom)
library(car)
library(patchwork)
library(openxlsx)
library(huxtable)

source('workflow/scripts/config.R')
```

```{r load-data}
# Load data pre-built by 00_load_analysis_data.R
lastvisit_nomci_dat <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_CLEANED_PATH, "PREVENTAD_lastvisit_nomci.rds"))

lastvisit_nomci_dat_long <- lastvisit_nomci_dat %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(BIOMARKERS_TRANS),
    names_to = "biomarker",
    values_to = "measure"
  ) 
```

## Risk burden distribution

```{r risk-burden-distribution}
#| fig-width: 12
#| fig-height: 5

p1 <- ggplot(lastvisit_nomci_dat, aes(x = factor(risk_score_cogd))) +
  geom_bar(fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_text(
    stat = "count",  
    aes(label = after_stat(count)),  
    vjust = -0.3,  
    hjust = 0.5,   
    size = 3.5     
  ) +
  labs(title = "CogDrisk Composite Risk Score Distribution",
       x = "Risk Score (0-4)", y = "Count") +
  theme_minimal()

p2 <- ggplot(lastvisit_nomci_dat, aes(x = factor(risk_score_libra2))) +
  geom_bar(fill = "coral", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_text(
    stat = "count",  
    aes(label = after_stat(count)),  
    vjust = -0.3,  
    hjust = 0.5,   
    size = 3.5     
  ) +
  labs(title = "LIBRA2 Composite Risk Score Distribution",
       x = "Risk Score (0-4)", y = "Count") +
  theme_minimal()

p1 + p2
```

Only 1 individuals has a CogDrisk-based composite risk score of 4, so collapse 
into a 3+ category for plotting.

## Burden associations with biomarker levels

```{r risk-burden-assoc, warning=FALSE}
#| fig-width: 12
#| fig-height: 6
#| out-width: "100%"
risk_scores_longer <- lastvisit_nomci_dat_long %>%
  select(risk_score_cogd, risk_score_libra2,
         biomarker, measure) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(risk_score_cogd, risk_score_libra2),
               names_to = "risk_score_type",
               values_to = "risk_score_value") %>%
  mutate(
    # Extract model type (CogDrisk or LIBRA2)
    model_type = case_when(
      str_detect(risk_score_type, "cogd") ~ "CogDrisk",
      str_detect(risk_score_type, "libra2") ~ "LIBRA2"
    ),
    
    # Collapse CogDrisk 4 individuals into 3+ category
    risk_score_label = case_when(
      model_type == "CogDrisk" & risk_score_value == 3 ~ "3+",
      model_type == "CogDrisk" & risk_score_value == 4 ~ "3+",
      TRUE ~ as.character(risk_score_value)
    ),
    
    risk_score_factor = factor(risk_score_label)
  )

# CogDrisk only
cogdrisk_plot <- risk_scores_longer %>%
  filter(model_type == "CogDrisk") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = risk_score_factor, y = measure, fill = risk_score_factor)) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, fill = "white") +
  facet_wrap(~biomarker, scales = "free") +
  stat_compare_means(method = "kruskal.test",
                     label.x.npc = 0.05,
                     label.y.npc = 0.8,
                     geom = "label",
                     size = 4) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "plasma", begin = 0.2, end = 0.9) +
  labs(x = "Composite Risk Score",
       y = "Biomarker Level",
       title = "Blood-based Biomarker Levels by CogDrisk Composite Risk Score") +
  #theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 10),
        legend.position = "none",
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90"),
        strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold"))
cogdrisk_plot

# LIBRA2 only
libra2_plot <- risk_scores_longer %>%
  filter(model_type == "LIBRA2") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = risk_score_factor, y = measure, fill = risk_score_factor)) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, fill = "white") +
  facet_wrap(~biomarker, scales = "free") +
  stat_compare_means(method = "kruskal.test",
                     label.y.npc = 0.8,
                     geom = "label",
                     size = 4) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "plasma", begin = 0.2, end = 0.9) +
  labs(x = "LIBRA2 Composite Risk Score",
       y = "Biomarker Level",
       title = "Biomarker Levels by LIBRA2 Composite Risk Score") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 10),
        legend.position = "none",
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90"),
        strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold"))
libra2_plot
```

## Linear regression model fitting

```{r regression}
risk_dat <- lastvisit_nomci_dat %>%
  # Z-scored CRS for interpretable per-SD coefficient plots
  mutate(score_cogd_z = as.numeric(scale(score_cogd)),
         score_libra2_z = as.numeric(scale(score_libra2)))

# Models
models <- tribble(~model, ~predictors,
                  "CogDrisk", "risk_score_cogd",
                  "LIBRA2", "age + sex + educ + risk_score_libra2",
                  
                  # CRS and GRS as continuous measures
                  "CogDrisk_cont", "apoe_burden + score_cogd_z + GRS + fhx_burden",
                  "LIBRA2_cont", "age + sex + educ + apoe_burden + score_libra2_z + GRS + fhx_burden") 

# Fitting models
risk_preventad <- expand_grid(
  outcome = BIOMARKERS_TRANS,
  models
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    eq = glue("{outcome} ~ {predictors}"),
    res = map(eq, ~lm(as.formula(.), data = risk_dat)),
    dataf = map(res, tidy),
    mod = map(res, glance)
  )
```

```{r regression-results}
# Shared outcome labels used by all downstream plot and table chunks
outcome_labels <- c(
  ab_ratio               = "Aβ42/40",
  gfap_log               = "GFAP (log)",
  nfl_log                = "NfL (log)",
  ptau181_log            = "p-tau181 (log)",
  ptau217_log            = "p-tau217 (log)",
  ptau217_ab42_ratio_log = "p-tau217/Aβ42 (log)"
)

res_risk_preventad <- bind_rows(select(risk_preventad, model, outcome, dataf)) %>%
  unnest(dataf) %>%
  filter(
    str_detect(term, '^risk_|^apoe_burden|^grs_|^fhx_burden|^score|^GRS$')
  ) %>%
  arrange(outcome, term, estimate) %>%
  # FDR within each model separately so models are not pooled across one another
  group_by(model) %>%
  mutate(
    # FDR adjustment
    p.adj = p.adjust(p.value, method="fdr"),
    
    # Significance flag
    sig = factor(
      case_when(p.adj < 0.05 ~ "Significant (FDR-adjusted)",
                p.value < 0.05 ~ "Significant (non-adjusted)",
                TRUE ~ "Not significant"),
      levels = c("Significant (FDR-adjusted)", "Significant (non-adjusted)", "Not significant")
    ),
    
    # Confidence intervals
    conf.low = estimate - (std.error * 1.96),
    conf.high = estimate + (std.error * 1.96),
    
    # Exponentiated values for log-transformed outcomes 
    exp_est = case_when(
      str_detect(outcome, "_log") ~ exp(estimate),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    exp_lci = case_when(
      str_detect(outcome, "_log") ~ exp(conf.low),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    exp_uci = case_when(
      str_detect(outcome, "_log") ~ exp(conf.high),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    pct_change = case_when(
      str_detect(outcome, "_log") ~ (exp_est - 1) * 100,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    
    # Significance stars
    stars = case_when(
      p.adj > 0.05 ~ "", 
      between(p.adj,  0.01, 0.05) ~ "*",
      between(p.adj, 0.001, 0.01) ~ "**",
      p.adj < 0.001 ~ "***"
    ),
    
    # Composite score type
    composite_type = if_else(str_detect(model, "CogDrisk"), "CogDrisk", "LIBRA2")
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  # Round numeric values
  mutate(across(c(estimate, std.error, statistic, p.value,
                  conf.low, conf.high, exp_est, exp_lci, exp_uci, pct_change),
                ~round(., digits = 3)))
```

## Regression results 

### Multivariable associations

```{r multivar-assoc-plot}
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 9
#| out-width: "100%"

outcome_labels <- c(
  ab_ratio               = "A\u03b242/40",
  gfap_log               = "GFAP (log)",
  nfl_log                = "NfL (log)",
  ptau181_log            = "p-tau181 (log)",
  ptau217_log            = "p-tau217 (log)",
  ptau217_ab42_ratio_log = "p-tau217/A\u03b242 (log)"
)

# Term ordering: top to bottom in plot
term_order <- c(
  "Clinical Risk Score",
  "APOE \u03b54 Carrier",
  "Family History (\u22652 FDR)",
  "Genetic Risk Score"
)

plot_data_combined <- bind_rows(
  res_risk_preventad %>%
    filter(model == "CogDrisk_cont") %>%
    mutate(
      composite_type = "CogDrisk",
      term = case_when(
        term == "apoe_burden"  ~ "APOE \u03b54 Carrier",
        term == "fhx_burden"   ~ "Family History (\u22652 FDR)",
        term == "score_cogd_z" ~ "Clinical Risk Score",
        term == "GRS"          ~ "Genetic Risk Score",
        TRUE ~ term
      )
    ),
  res_risk_preventad %>%
    filter(model == "LIBRA2_cont") %>%
    mutate(
      composite_type = "LIBRA2",
      term = case_when(
        term == "apoe_burden"   ~ "APOE \u03b54 Carrier",
        term == "fhx_burden"    ~ "Family History (\u22652 FDR)",
        term == "score_libra2_z" ~ "Clinical Risk Score",
        term == "GRS"           ~ "Genetic Risk Score",
        TRUE ~ term
      )
    )
) %>%
  mutate(
    sig            = factor(sig, levels = c(TRUE, FALSE)),
    composite_type = factor(composite_type, levels = c("CogDrisk", "LIBRA2")),
    outcome_label  = outcome_labels[outcome],
    term           = factor(term, levels = rev(term_order))
  )

caption_text <- paste0(
  "Cohort: PREVENT-AD. N = ", nrow(risk_dat), "\n",
  "Models: Biomarker ~ APOE \u03b54 + Composite Score + Genetic Risk Score + Family History\n",
  "Composite scores z-scored; \u03b2 reflects per-SD change. ",
  "Shared terms (APOE \u03b54, GRS, Family History) estimated separately per model."
)

res_plot_combined <- ggplot(
  plot_data_combined,
  aes(y = term, x = estimate,
      xmin = conf.low, xmax = conf.high,
      color = composite_type,
      alpha = sig,
      group = composite_type)
) +
  geom_point(size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.6)) +
  geom_errorbarh(linewidth = 0.8, position = position_dodge(width = 0.6), height = 0.3) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = 2, color = "grey40") +
  scale_alpha_manual(
    values = c(`FALSE` = 0.25, `TRUE` = 1),
    labels = c(`FALSE` = "Not Significant", `TRUE` = "Significant"),
    name = "Significance"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("CogDrisk" = "#374E55FF", "LIBRA2" = "#DF8F44FF"),
    breaks = c("CogDrisk", "LIBRA2"),
    name = "Model"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~outcome_label, scales = "free_x", ncol = 3) +
  labs(
    x       = "Beta (95% CI)",
    y       = "Predictor",
    title   = "Figure 1. Composite Risk Burden Components Coefficient Plots",
    caption = caption_text
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.y    = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text.x    = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.title     = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    plot.title     = element_text(size = 15, hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    plot.caption   = element_text(size = 9, hjust = 0, lineheight = 1.2,
                                  margin = margin(t = 10)),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90"),
    strip.text     = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title   = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
    legend.text    = element_text(size = 9)
  )

res_plot_combined

# ggsave(file.path(AIM1_OUTPUT_PATH$figures, "fig1_risk_lm_res.png"),
#        res_plot_combined,
#        width = 16, height = 10, dpi = 300)
```

```{r multivar-assoc-table}
biomarker_order_mv <- c(
  "A\u03b242/40 ratio", "GFAP (log)", "NfL (log)",
  "p-tau181 (log)", "p-tau217 (log)", "p-tau217/A\u03b242 ratio (log)"
)

term_order_mv <- c(
  "APOE \u03b54 Carrier", "PRS", "PXS", "FHx",
  "Covariates",
  "Age", "Sex", "Education (years)"
)

covariate_terms <- c("Age", "Sex", "Education (years)")

multivar_raw <- risk_preventad %>%
  filter(model %in% c("CogDrisk_cont", "LIBRA2_cont")) %>%
  select(model, outcome, dataf) %>%
  unnest(dataf) %>%
  filter(term != "(Intercept)") %>%
  mutate(
    conf.low    = estimate - 1.96 * std.error,
    conf.high   = estimate + 1.96 * std.error,
    beta_se     = sprintf("%.3f (%.3f)", estimate, std.error),
    ci          = sprintf("[%.3f, %.3f]", conf.low, conf.high),
    p_fmt       = if_else(p.value < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p.value)),
    # FDR on primary predictors only (APOE, PXS, GRS, FHx);
    # covariates (age, sex, education) are excluded from the pool
    p_adj = {
      adj      <- rep(NA_real_, n())
      idx      <- str_detect(term, "^apoe_burden|^score_cogd_z|^score_libra2_z|^GRS$|^fhx_burden")
      adj[idx] <- p.adjust(p.value[idx], method = "fdr")
      adj
    },
    p_adj_fmt   = if_else(!is.na(p_adj),
                          if_else(p_adj < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p_adj)),
                          "—"),
    p_adj_stars = if_else(!is.na(p_adj) & p_adj < 0.05, "sig", ""),
    stars       = case_when(
      p.value < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p.value < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p.value < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE            ~ ""
    ),
    model_short = if_else(str_detect(model, "CogDrisk"), "CogDrisk", "LIBRA2"),
    biomarker   = case_when(
      outcome == "ab_ratio"               ~ "A\u03b242/40 ratio",
      outcome == "gfap_log"               ~ "GFAP (log)",
      outcome == "nfl_log"                ~ "NfL (log)",
      outcome == "ptau181_log"            ~ "p-tau181 (log)",
      outcome == "ptau217_log"            ~ "p-tau217 (log)",
      outcome == "ptau217_ab42_ratio_log" ~ "p-tau217/A\u03b242 ratio (log)"
    ),
    term_label  = case_when(
      term %in% c("score_cogd_z", "score_libra2_z") ~ "PXS",
      term == "apoe_burden"                          ~ "APOE \u03b54 Carrier",
      term == "GRS"                                  ~ "PRS",
      term == "fhx_burden"                           ~ "FHx",
      term == "age"                                  ~ "Age",
      term == "sexMale"                              ~ "Sex",
      term == "educ"                                 ~ "Education (years)",
      TRUE ~ term
    )
  )

multivar_wide <- multivar_raw %>%
  select(model_short, biomarker, term_label, beta_se, ci, p_fmt, p_adj_fmt, p_adj_stars, stars) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = model_short,
    values_from = c(beta_se, ci, p_fmt, p_adj_fmt, p_adj_stars, stars),
    names_glue  = "{model_short}_{.value}"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    across(c(CogDrisk_beta_se, CogDrisk_ci, CogDrisk_p_fmt, CogDrisk_p_adj_fmt), ~replace_na(., "\u2014")),
    CogDrisk_stars       = replace_na(CogDrisk_stars, ""),
    CogDrisk_p_adj_stars = replace_na(CogDrisk_p_adj_stars, "")
  )

# "Covariates" label row per biomarker — acts as a sub-section header
covariate_header <- multivar_wide %>%
  distinct(biomarker) %>%
  mutate(
    term_label            = "Covariates",
    CogDrisk_beta_se      = "", CogDrisk_ci = "", CogDrisk_p_fmt = "", CogDrisk_p_adj_fmt = "", CogDrisk_p_adj_stars = "", CogDrisk_stars = "",
    LIBRA2_beta_se        = "", LIBRA2_ci   = "", LIBRA2_p_fmt   = "", LIBRA2_p_adj_fmt   = "", LIBRA2_p_adj_stars   = "", LIBRA2_stars   = ""
  )

multivar_combined <- bind_rows(multivar_wide, covariate_header) %>%
  mutate(
    biomarker  = factor(biomarker,  levels = biomarker_order_mv),
    term_label = factor(term_label, levels = term_order_mv)
  ) %>%
  arrange(biomarker, term_label) %>%
  select(biomarker, term_label,
         CogDrisk_beta_se, CogDrisk_ci, CogDrisk_p_fmt, CogDrisk_p_adj_fmt, CogDrisk_p_adj_stars, CogDrisk_stars,
         LIBRA2_beta_se,   LIBRA2_ci,   LIBRA2_p_fmt,   LIBRA2_p_adj_fmt,   LIBRA2_p_adj_stars,   LIBRA2_stars)

multivar_gt <- multivar_combined %>%
  gt(groupname_col = "biomarker") %>%
  tab_header(
    title    = md("**Table S2.** Multivariable Associations between Composite Risk Burden and Plasma Biomarkers"),
    subtitle = md(glue("Linear regression; N = {nrow(risk_dat)}. Clinical risk scores z-scored (\u03b2 per SD)."))
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label   = md("**CogDrisk**"),
    columns = starts_with("CogDrisk_")
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label   = md("**LIBRA2**"),
    columns = starts_with("LIBRA2_")
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    term_label         = md("**Predictor**"),
    CogDrisk_beta_se   = md("**\u03b2 (SE)**"),
    CogDrisk_ci        = md("**95% CI**"),
    CogDrisk_p_fmt     = md("**p**"),
    CogDrisk_p_adj_fmt = md("**q**"),
    LIBRA2_beta_se     = md("**\u03b2 (SE)**"),
    LIBRA2_ci          = md("**95% CI**"),
    LIBRA2_p_fmt       = md("**p**"),
    LIBRA2_p_adj_fmt   = md("**q**")
  ) %>%
  cols_hide(columns = c(CogDrisk_stars, CogDrisk_p_adj_stars, LIBRA2_stars, LIBRA2_p_adj_stars)) %>%
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_fill(color = "#e8f4e8"),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = CogDrisk_p_fmt,
      rows    = CogDrisk_stars %in% c("*", "**", "***")
    )
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_fill(color = "#e8f4e8"),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = LIBRA2_p_fmt,
      rows    = LIBRA2_stars %in% c("*", "**", "***")
    )
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_fill(color = "#c8e6c9"),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = CogDrisk_p_adj_fmt,
      rows    = CogDrisk_p_adj_stars == "sig"
    )
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_fill(color = "#c8e6c9"),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = LIBRA2_p_adj_fmt,
      rows    = LIBRA2_p_adj_stars == "sig"
    )
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style     = list(cell_text(weight = "bold"),
                     cell_fill(color = "#f8f9fa")),
    locations = cells_row_groups()
  ) %>%
  # "Covariates" row styled as a sub-section header
  tab_style(
    style     = list(cell_text(weight = "bold", style = "italic"),
                     cell_fill(color = "#f0f2f4")),
    locations = cells_body(rows = term_label == "Covariates")
  ) %>%
  # Indent individual covariate rows
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_text(indent = px(16)),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = term_label,
      rows    = term_label %in% covariate_terms
    )
  ) %>%
  tab_footnote(
    footnote  = md("p: unadjusted; q: Benjamini-Hochberg FDR-adjusted. CogDrisk model: biomarker ~ APOE \u03b54 + CogDrisk score (z) + PRS + FHx. LIBRA2 model: same risk predictors using LIBRA2 score (z), additionally adjusted for age, sex, and education. Light green: p<0.05; dark green: q<0.05. \u2014 = not applicable. Abbreviations: "),
    locations = cells_column_spanners()
  ) %>%
  cols_align(align = "left",   columns = term_label) %>%
  cols_align(align = "center", columns = c(starts_with("CogDrisk_"), starts_with("LIBRA2_"))) %>%
  row_group_order(groups = biomarker_order_mv)

multivar_gt

# gtsave(multivar_gt, filename = file.path(AIM1_OUTPUT_PATH$tables, "s_table2s_multivar_assoc.docx"))
```

### Cross-sectional associations

```{r xsect-assoc-plot}
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 9
#| out-width: "100%"

# --- Prediction grids ---
# CogDrisk: biomarker ~ risk_score_cogd (no additional covariates)
cogd_preds <- risk_preventad %>%
  filter(model == "CogDrisk") %>%
  mutate(
    preds = map(res, ~{
      nd <- data.frame(risk_score_cogd = seq(0, 4, by = 0.1))
      predict(.x, newdata = nd, interval = "confidence") %>%
        as_tibble() %>%
        bind_cols(nd)
    })
  ) %>%
  select(outcome, preds) %>%
  unnest(preds) %>%
  mutate(composite_type = "CogDrisk", risk_score = risk_score_cogd)

# LIBRA2: biomarker ~ age + sex + educ + risk_score_libra2
# Covariates held at mean (continuous) / "Female" (sex)
libra2_preds <- risk_preventad %>%
  filter(model == "LIBRA2") %>%
  mutate(
    preds = map(res, ~{
      nd <- data.frame(
        risk_score_libra2 = seq(0, 4, by = 0.1),
        age  = mean(risk_dat$age,  na.rm = TRUE),
        sex  = "Female",
        educ = mean(risk_dat$educ, na.rm = TRUE)
      )
      predict(.x, newdata = nd, interval = "confidence") %>%
        as_tibble() %>%
        bind_cols(nd)
    })
  ) %>%
  select(outcome, preds) %>%
  unnest(preds) %>%
  mutate(composite_type = "LIBRA2", risk_score = risk_score_libra2)

pred_data <- bind_rows(cogd_preds, libra2_preds) %>%
  mutate(
    composite_type = factor(composite_type, levels = c("CogDrisk", "LIBRA2")),
    outcome_label  = factor(outcome_labels[outcome], levels = outcome_labels)
  )

# --- Observed data (both scores in long format) ---
obs_data <- bind_rows(
  risk_dat %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = all_of(BIOMARKERS_TRANS),
                 names_to = "outcome", values_to = "measure") %>%
    mutate(composite_type = "CogDrisk", risk_score = risk_score_cogd),
  risk_dat %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = all_of(BIOMARKERS_TRANS),
                 names_to = "outcome", values_to = "measure") %>%
    mutate(composite_type = "LIBRA2", risk_score = risk_score_libra2)
) %>%
  filter(!is.na(measure)) %>%
  mutate(
    composite_type = factor(composite_type, levels = c("CogDrisk", "LIBRA2")),
    outcome_label  = factor(outcome_labels[outcome], levels = outcome_labels)
  )

# --- Per-facet annotations (β, 95% CI, p-value) ---
annot_data <- bind_rows(
  res_risk_preventad %>%
    filter(model == "CogDrisk", term == "risk_score_cogd") %>%
    mutate(composite_type = "CogDrisk"),
  res_risk_preventad %>%
    filter(model == "LIBRA2", term == "risk_score_libra2") %>%
    mutate(composite_type = "LIBRA2")
) %>%
  mutate(
    composite_type = factor(composite_type, levels = c("CogDrisk", "LIBRA2")),
    outcome_label  = factor(outcome_labels[outcome], levels = outcome_labels),
    p_fmt = if_else(p.value < 0.001, "< 0.001", as.character(p.value)),
    annot = paste0("\u03b2 = ", estimate,
                   " [", conf.low, ", ", conf.high, "], ",
                   "p = ", p_fmt, if_else(stars == "", "", paste0(" ", stars)))
  )

# --- Plot ---
p_xsect <- ggplot() +
  geom_jitter(data = obs_data,
              aes(x = risk_score, y = measure, color = composite_type),
              width = 0.12, alpha = 0.15, size = 0.8) +
  geom_ribbon(data = pred_data,
              aes(x = risk_score, ymin = lwr, ymax = upr, fill = composite_type),
              alpha = 0.2) +
  geom_line(data = pred_data,
            aes(x = risk_score, y = fit, color = composite_type),
            linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_label(data = annot_data %>% filter(composite_type == "CogDrisk"),
             aes(x = -Inf, y = Inf, label = annot),
             inherit.aes = FALSE,
             hjust = -0.1, vjust = 2,
             size = 5, color = "#374E55FF",
             label.padding = unit(0.15, "lines"),
             fill = alpha("white", 0.85), label.size = 0.3) +
  geom_label(data = annot_data %>% filter(composite_type == "LIBRA2"),
             aes(x = Inf, y = -Inf, label = annot),
             inherit.aes = FALSE,
             hjust = 1.1, vjust = -2,
             size = 5, color = "#DF8F44FF",
             label.padding = unit(0.15, "lines"),
             fill = alpha("white", 0.85), linewidth = 0.3) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("CogDrisk" = "#374E55FF", "LIBRA2" = "#DF8F44FF"),
    name = "Model"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("CogDrisk" = "#374E55FF", "LIBRA2" = "#DF8F44FF"),
    name = "Model"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 0:4) +
  facet_wrap(~outcome_label, scales = "free_y", ncol = 3) +
  labs(
    x       = "Composite Risk Score",
    y       = "Biomarker Level"#,
    #title   = "Figure 2. Predicted Biomarker Levels by Composite Risk Score"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y    = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text.x    = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title     = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
    #plot.title     = element_text(size = 15, hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    #plot.caption   = element_text(size = 9, hjust = 0, lineheight = 1.2,
    #                              margin = margin(t = 10)),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90"),
    strip.text     = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title   = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    legend.text    = element_text(size = 12)
  )

p_xsect
# ggsave(file.path(AIM1_OUTPUT_PATH$figures, "fig3_xsectional.png"),
#        p_xsect,
#        width = 16, height = 10, dpi = 300)
```

```{r xsect-assoc-table}
biomarker_order_xs <- c(
  "A\u03b242/40 ratio", "GFAP (log)", "NfL (log)",
  "p-tau181 (log)", "p-tau217 (log)", "p-tau217/A\u03b242 ratio (log)"
)

term_order_xs <- c(
  "Composite Risk Score",
  "Covariates",
  "Age", "Sex (Male)", "Education (years)"
)

covariate_terms_xs <- c("Age", "Sex (Male)", "Education (years)")

xsect_raw <- risk_preventad %>%
  filter(model %in% c("CogDrisk", "LIBRA2")) %>%
  select(model, outcome, dataf) %>%
  unnest(dataf) %>%
  filter(term != "(Intercept)") %>%
  mutate(
    conf.low    = estimate - 1.96 * std.error,
    conf.high   = estimate + 1.96 * std.error,
    beta_se     = sprintf("%.3f (%.3f)", estimate, std.error),
    ci          = sprintf("[%.3f, %.3f]", conf.low, conf.high),
    p_fmt       = if_else(p.value < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p.value)),
    # FDR: 12 tests (6 biomarkers × 2 models) on the composite risk score only;
    # covariates (age, sex, education in the LIBRA2 model) excluded from pool
    p_adj = {
      adj      <- rep(NA_real_, n())
      idx      <- str_detect(term, "^risk_score")
      adj[idx] <- p.adjust(p.value[idx], method = "fdr")
      adj
    },
    p_adj_fmt   = if_else(!is.na(p_adj),
                          if_else(p_adj < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p_adj)),
                          "—"),
    p_adj_stars = if_else(!is.na(p_adj) & p_adj < 0.05, "sig", ""),
    stars       = case_when(
      p.value < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p.value < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p.value < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE            ~ ""
    ),
    model_short = model,
    biomarker   = case_when(
      outcome == "ab_ratio"               ~ "A\u03b242/40 ratio",
      outcome == "gfap_log"               ~ "GFAP (log)",
      outcome == "nfl_log"                ~ "NfL (log)",
      outcome == "ptau181_log"            ~ "p-tau181 (log)",
      outcome == "ptau217_log"            ~ "p-tau217 (log)",
      outcome == "ptau217_ab42_ratio_log" ~ "p-tau217/A\u03b242 ratio (log)"
    ),
    term_label  = case_when(
      term %in% c("risk_score_cogd", "risk_score_libra2") ~ "Composite Risk Score",
      term == "age"                                        ~ "Age",
      term == "sexMale"                                    ~ "Sex (Male)",
      term == "educ"                                       ~ "Education (years)",
      TRUE ~ term
    )
  )

xsect_wide <- xsect_raw %>%
  select(model_short, biomarker, term_label, beta_se, ci, p_fmt, p_adj_fmt, p_adj_stars, stars) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = model_short,
    values_from = c(beta_se, ci, p_fmt, p_adj_fmt, p_adj_stars, stars),
    names_glue  = "{model_short}_{.value}"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    across(c(CogDrisk_beta_se, CogDrisk_ci, CogDrisk_p_fmt, CogDrisk_p_adj_fmt), ~replace_na(., "\u2014")),
    CogDrisk_stars       = replace_na(CogDrisk_stars, ""),
    CogDrisk_p_adj_stars = replace_na(CogDrisk_p_adj_stars, "")
  )

# "Covariates" label row per biomarker — acts as a sub-section header
covariate_header_xs <- xsect_wide %>%
  distinct(biomarker) %>%
  mutate(
    term_label            = "Covariates",
    CogDrisk_beta_se      = "", CogDrisk_ci = "", CogDrisk_p_fmt = "", CogDrisk_p_adj_fmt = "", CogDrisk_p_adj_stars = "", CogDrisk_stars = "",
    LIBRA2_beta_se        = "", LIBRA2_ci   = "", LIBRA2_p_fmt   = "", LIBRA2_p_adj_fmt   = "", LIBRA2_p_adj_stars   = "", LIBRA2_stars   = ""
  )

xsect_combined <- bind_rows(xsect_wide, covariate_header_xs) %>%
  mutate(
    biomarker  = factor(biomarker,  levels = biomarker_order_xs),
    term_label = factor(term_label, levels = term_order_xs)
  ) %>%
  arrange(biomarker, term_label) %>%
  select(biomarker, term_label,
         CogDrisk_beta_se, CogDrisk_ci, CogDrisk_p_fmt, CogDrisk_p_adj_fmt, CogDrisk_p_adj_stars, CogDrisk_stars,
         LIBRA2_beta_se,   LIBRA2_ci,   LIBRA2_p_fmt,   LIBRA2_p_adj_fmt,   LIBRA2_p_adj_stars,   LIBRA2_stars)

xsect_gt <- xsect_combined %>%
  gt(groupname_col = "biomarker") %>%
  tab_header(
    title    = md("**Table S3.** Cross-sectional Associations between Composite Risk Score and Plasma Biomarkers"),
    subtitle = md(glue("Linear regression; N = {nrow(risk_dat)}."))
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label   = md("**CogDrisk**"),
    columns = starts_with("CogDrisk_")
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label   = md("**LIBRA2**"),
    columns = starts_with("LIBRA2_")
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    term_label         = md("**Predictor**"),
    CogDrisk_beta_se   = md("**\u03b2 (SE)**"),
    CogDrisk_ci        = md("**95% CI**"),
    CogDrisk_p_fmt     = md("**p**"),
    CogDrisk_p_adj_fmt = md("**q**"),
    LIBRA2_beta_se     = md("**\u03b2 (SE)**"),
    LIBRA2_ci          = md("**95% CI**"),
    LIBRA2_p_fmt       = md("**p**"),
    LIBRA2_p_adj_fmt   = md("**q**")
  ) %>%
  cols_hide(columns = c(CogDrisk_stars, CogDrisk_p_adj_stars, LIBRA2_stars, LIBRA2_p_adj_stars)) %>%
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_fill(color = "#e8f4e8"),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = CogDrisk_p_fmt,
      rows    = CogDrisk_stars %in% c("*", "**", "***")
    )
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_fill(color = "#e8f4e8"),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = LIBRA2_p_fmt,
      rows    = LIBRA2_stars %in% c("*", "**", "***")
    )
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_fill(color = "#c8e6c9"),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = CogDrisk_p_adj_fmt,
      rows    = CogDrisk_p_adj_stars == "sig"
    )
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_fill(color = "#c8e6c9"),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = LIBRA2_p_adj_fmt,
      rows    = LIBRA2_p_adj_stars == "sig"
    )
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style     = list(cell_text(weight = "bold"),
                     cell_fill(color = "#f8f9fa")),
    locations = cells_row_groups()
  ) %>%
  # "Covariates" row styled as a sub-section header
  tab_style(
    style     = list(cell_text(weight = "bold", style = "italic"),
                     cell_fill(color = "#f0f2f4")),
    locations = cells_body(rows = term_label == "Covariates")
  ) %>%
  # Indent individual covariate rows
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_text(indent = px(16)),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = term_label,
      rows    = term_label %in% covariate_terms_xs
    )
  ) %>%
  tab_footnote(
    footnote  = md("p: unadjusted; q: Benjamini-Hochberg FDR-adjusted. CogDrisk model: biomarker ~ composite risk score (no additional covariates). LIBRA2 model: biomarker ~ composite risk score + age + sex + education. Light green: p<0.05; dark green: q<0.05. \u2014 = not applicable."),
    locations = cells_column_spanners()
  ) %>%
  cols_align(align = "left",   columns = term_label) %>%
  cols_align(align = "center", columns = c(starts_with("CogDrisk_"), starts_with("LIBRA2_"))) %>%
  row_group_order(groups = biomarker_order_xs)

xsect_gt
# gtsave(xsect_gt, filename = file.path(AIM1_OUTPUT_PATH$tables, "s_table3s_xsect_assoc.docx"))
```

## Save results

```{r save-results}
# Save main results table
df <- res_risk_preventad %>%
  filter(!str_detect(model, '_cont'))

write_csv(res_risk_preventad, file.path(AIM1_OUTPUT_PATH$tables, "crosssectional_s_results.csv"))
```
